blogs.title: Scalable URL Shortener System Design (Like Bitly)
blogs.description: A deep dive into designing a scalable URL shortener system covering architecture, database design, caching, and scalability strategies.
blogs.author: Abhishek

blogs.title: Size Matters (But So Does Quantity): Horizontal vs. Vertical Scaling
blogs.description: Should you buy a bigger server or add more servers? Learn the real-world trade-offs between Vertical Scaling (Scale Up) and Horizontal Scaling (Scale Out) with practical examples, architecture diagrams, and production insights.
blogs.author: Abhishek
